news.t: CORRECTING and REPLACING First Trust Expands ETF Lineup with Launch of Three New Target Outcome Strategy ETFs
First Trust Expands ETF Lineup with Launch of Three New Target Outcome Strategy ETFs

overview.description: The FT Vest Growth Strength & Target Income ETF (FGSI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in income alternatives. The fund targets monthly income by combining dividend-paying stocks of financially strong US companies with an active S&P 500 call-writing strategy. The fund aims for a total annual yield about 8% above the S&P 500s dividend rate. FGSI was launched on Jun 25, 2025 and is issued by First Trust.
